caption: After conducting an exhaustive study on the spatial dynamics of toppings, I've conclusively determined that the optimal pizza slice fold angle is 47.3 degrees, thereby maximizing cheese retention and minimizing sauce displacement. This phenomenon, known as "Fold-Induced Topping Stability" (FITS), is a crucial consideration for any serious pizza enthusiast. Failure to adhere to this precise angle will inevitably result in a catastrophic loss of toppings and a severe case of dinner disappointment.
